description_long: This object is a tall, slender potted plant with a single main stem and multiple offshoots bearing elongated, pointed leaves. The leaves are a muted brown color, suggesting either a dried or artificial plant, and are arranged alternately along the stem. Several small buds or seed pods are visible near the top and along the stem, adding texture and detail. The plant appears to be supported by a thin, light-colored stem, and there is no visible soil or pot base in the images. A small, rectangular plant identification label is attached to the stem, indicating it may be cataloged or for sale. The overall appearance is minimalistic and decorative, suitable for urban or indoor environments.
description: A tall, slender potted plant with brown, pointed leaves and small buds along a single stem, featuring a visible plant label. The plant has a dried or artificial look and is minimalistic in style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the plant, with leaves and buds clearly visible along the stem and the plant label attached at mid-height.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plant's thin profile and the staggered arrangement of leaves, with the label more prominently displayed.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the plant, with leaves and buds visible but the label less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the upper cluster of leaves and buds, and the stem's curvature.
